problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: Combining Bacteriophage surface display for targeting with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
